name: Two-mechanism ensemble — Donchian sleeve + unlevered dated-basis sleeve (ONE hypothesis)
role: infrastructure + content; honest powered horizon ~11-16 years at sleeve Sharpes 0.3-0.7 (rho~0) per PROJECT_REVIEW section 3 — NOT a practical SURVIVE attempt, stated bluntly
scoring_unit: the ensemble return series only; sleeves are diagnostics, never adjudicated separately

dated_basis_unlevered.instruments: BTC + ETH Binance COIN-M quarterly futures vs spot
dated_basis_unlevered.trade: long spot + short contango quarterly, hold to convergence; stack front + next quarter, equal-weight across active legs
dated_basis_unlevered.entry_rule: enter only when annualized basis NET of contemporaneous trailing-30d perp-funding carry exceeds hurdle
dated_basis_unlevered.note: unlevered only — the levered variant was a financing-leak artifact killed by the 2026-06-01 audit

weights.scheme: inverse-volatility, equal-risk 50/50, frozen from pre-commit data only

derivation.donchian_vol_source: canonical N=120 zscore HIGH replication on output/crossxs/daily-closes.json, 2026-06-09
derivation.formula: w_i = (1/ann_vol_i) / sum_j (1/ann_vol_j); each sleeve contributes ~3.18%/yr vol at rho~0

weights.rebalancing: frozen capital weights restored at each quarterly look only; no re-estimation ever

costs_financing: all sleeve-level costs per sleeve specs; financing charged on full notional (audit error class i)
kill_condition: ensemble cumulative net mean <= 0 at any look with >= 2 years of data, OR both sleeves individually killed (E1 kill condition; basis sleeve annualized excess <= 0 over >= 2 years)
source: scripts/edgehunt/dated_futures_carry.ts lines 45-48 (TAKER, early-unwind constants), 104-110 (CarryConfig), 132-186 (entry/exit/roll simulation), 289-296 (primary committed config: annHurdle 0.06, exitBackwardation, chargeEarlyUnwind, purgePerpAtEntry)
docs/EDGE_SEARCH_DOMAIN_CAMPAIGN.md audit update 2026-06-01 (levered carry = financing leak; unlevered ~4.9%/yr t=2.41 DSR 0.60)
